case_title: VAUDO, VANESSA VS RITCHEY, RENEE M.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT RITCHEY, RENEE M. RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT VAUDO, VANESSA $799.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $839.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF VAUDO, VANESSA HEARING SET FOR SEP-07-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VAUDO, VANESSA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RITCHEY, RENEE M. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING SENT TO RENEE RITCHEY RETURNED UNDELIVERED. NO SUCH NUMBER.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-12-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-07-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED TO 7/7/06 AT 8:30 A.M. DEFENDANT TO FILE CROSS COMPLAINT.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $799.00 FILED BY RITCHEY, RENEE M. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT VAUDO, VANESSA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-07-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS OF SEP-07-2006, DENIED

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO VANESSA VAUDO, REURNED TO COURT, NO SUCH NUMBER.
